title: Ventilated trash can
abstract: A trash can that includes: four sides where the four sides include two first opposing sides and two second opposing sides; a vent system at the bottom of each second opposing side; and a top opening. The vent system preferably includes a plurality of holes, wherein the holes include air fresheners.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A trash can comprising: a. four sides where the four sides include two first opposing sides and two second opposing sides; b. a vent system at the bottom of each second opposing side; and c. a top opening. 2. The trash can according to Claim 1, wherein the vent system includes a plurality of holes. 3. The trash can according to Claim 2, wherein the vent holes include air fresheners.
